Package com.pallycon.widevinelibrary

Interface PallyconWVMSDK

  • public interface PallyconWVMSDK
    provides APIs needed to initialize Widevine SDK, confirm initialization, delete license, and acquire PallyconDrmSessionManager.

    It can be acquired by PallyconWVMSDKFactory.getInstance(Context) and it is a singleton.

    Created by PallyconTeam

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface Description
      static interface  PallyconWVMSDK.DownloadLicenseResultCallback
      called by event during license download.

      creates DrmSessionManager which will be used in ExoPlayer for DRM process using token.

      initializes Widevine SDK.
      boolean isInitialized()
      checks if Widevine SDK is initialized.
      boolean isL1WidevineAvailable​(java.lang.String mimeType)
      checks availability of L1 security level.
      boolean provideForceProvisionRequest()
      Try when all DRM content suddenly fails to play on the device and there is an error like the one below.
      void release()
      releases Widevine SDK.

      removes issued license

      It can be used in your service by setting a cookie value.
      void setForceSecurityLevelL3​(boolean securityLevelL3)
      change the security level from Security Level L1 devices to Security Level L3.
      void setPallyconEventListener​(PallyconEventListener eventListener)
      sets the listener for handling events dispatched by WideVineSDK.
      void setPallyconKeyRequestCallback​(PallyconKeyRequest keyRequest)
      sets the callback for handling Content Key dispatched by WidevineSDK.
      void setPallyconLoggingListener​(PallyconLoggingListener loggingListener)
      sets the listener for handling logging dispatched by WideVineSDK.

    • Method Detail

      • init

        void init​(android.content.Context context,
          android.os.Handler eventHandler,
          java.lang.String siteId,
          java.lang.String siteKey)
   throws PallyconDrmException
        initializes Widevine SDK.

        Widevine instance cannot be used without initialization.

        Parameters:
        context - inputs context object
        eventHandler - inputs handler for MainThread
        siteId - inputs Site ID which is issued on PallyCon service registration
        siteKey - inputs Site Key which is issued on PallyCon service registration
        Throws:
        PallyconDrmException - Description is in the link

      • release

        void release()
        releases Widevine SDK.

      • setPallyconEventListener

        void setPallyconEventListener​(PallyconEventListener eventListener)
        sets the listener for handling events dispatched by WideVineSDK.
        Parameters:
        eventListener - PallyconEventListener

      • setPallyconLoggingListener

        void setPallyconLoggingListener​(PallyconLoggingListener loggingListener)
        sets the listener for handling logging dispatched by WideVineSDK.
        Parameters:
        loggingListener - PallyconLoggingListener

      • setPallyconKeyRequestCallback

        void setPallyconKeyRequestCallback​(PallyconKeyRequest keyRequest)
        sets the callback for handling Content Key dispatched by WidevineSDK.
        Parameters:
        keyRequest - PallyconKeyRequest

      • setForceSecurityLevelL3

        void setForceSecurityLevelL3​(boolean securityLevelL3)
        change the security level from Security Level L1 devices to Security Level L3. L1 = Hardware DRM, L3 = Software DRM. The default is to operate with the system security level. For the security level to take effect, must call setForceSecurityLevelL3() before requesting a license.
        Parameters:
        securityLevelL3 - FALSE is system security level, TRUE is security level L3.

      • isInitialized

        boolean isInitialized()
        checks if Widevine SDK is initialized.
        Returns:
        true or not

      • createDrmSessionManagerByToken

        com.google.android.exoplayer2.drm.DrmSessionManager createDrmSessionManagerByToken​(java.util.UUID drmSchemeUuid,
                                                                                   java.lang.String drmLicenseUrl,
                                                                                   android.net.Uri uri,
                                                                                   java.lang.String token)
                                                                            throws PallyconDrmException
        creates DrmSessionManager which will be used in ExoPlayer for DRM process using token.

        The Manager instance should be set to ExoPlayerFactory as a parameter.

        Parameters:
        drmSchemeUuid - C.WIDEVINE_UUID, unique ID of Widevine DRM
        drmLicenseUrl - address of license server
        uri - address of content
        token - Token for license acquisition
        Returns:
        PallyconDrmSessionManager
        Throws:
        PallyconDrmException - Description is in the link

      • createDrmSessionManagerByToken

        com.google.android.exoplayer2.drm.DrmSessionManager createDrmSessionManagerByToken​(java.util.UUID drmSchemeUuid,
                                                                                   java.lang.String drmLicenseUrl,
                                                                                   android.net.Uri uri,
                                                                                   java.lang.String userId,
                                                                                   java.lang.String cid,
                                                                                   java.lang.String token,
                                                                                   boolean multiSession)
                                                                            throws PallyconDrmException
        creates DrmSessionManager which will be used in ExoPlayer for DRM process using token.

        The Manager instance should be set to ExoPlayerFactory as a parameter.

        Parameters:
        drmSchemeUuid - C.WIDEVINE_UUID, unique ID of Widevine DRM
        drmLicenseUrl - address of license server
        uri - address of content
        userId - ID of content service
        cid - ID of content
        token - Token for license acquisition
        multiSession - value of key rotation
        Returns:
        PallyconDrmSessionManager
        Throws:
        PallyconDrmException - Description is in the link

      • createDrmSessionManager

        com.google.android.exoplayer2.drm.DrmSessionManager createDrmSessionManager​(java.util.UUID drmSchemeUuid,
                                                                            java.lang.String drmLicenseUrl,
                                                                            android.net.Uri uri,
                                                                            java.lang.String userId,
                                                                            java.lang.String cid,
                                                                            java.lang.String oid,
                                                                            boolean multiSession)
                                                                     throws PallyconDrmException
        creates DrmSessionManager which will be used in ExoPlayer for DRM process.

        The Manager instance should be set to ExoPlayerFactory as a parameter.

        Parameters:
        drmSchemeUuid - C.WIDEVINE_UUID, unique ID of Widevine DRM
        drmLicenseUrl - address of license server
        uri - address of content
        userId - ID of content service
        cid - ID of content
        oid - order ID (optional)
        multiSession - value of key rotation
        Returns:
        PallyconDrmSessionManager
        Throws:
        PallyconDrmException - Description is in the link

      • createDrmSessionManagerByCustomData

        com.google.android.exoplayer2.drm.DrmSessionManager createDrmSessionManagerByCustomData​(java.util.UUID drmSchemeUuid,
                                                                                        java.lang.String drmLicenseUrl,
                                                                                        android.net.Uri uri,
                                                                                        java.lang.String customData,
                                                                                        boolean multiSession)
                                                                                 throws PallyconDrmException
        creates DrmSessionManager which will be used in ExoPlayer for DRM process using custom data.

        The Manager instance should be set to ExoPlayerFactory as a parameter.

        Parameters:
        drmSchemeUuid - C.WIDEVINE_UUID, unique ID of Widevine DRM
        drmLicenseUrl - address of license server
        uri - address of content
        customData - custom data
        multiSession - value of key rotation
        Returns:
        PallyconDrmSessionManager
        Throws:
        PallyconDrmException - Description is in the link

      • createDrmSessionManagerByProxy

        com.google.android.exoplayer2.drm.DrmSessionManager createDrmSessionManagerByProxy​(java.util.UUID drmSchemeUuid,
                                                                                   java.lang.String drmLicenseUrl,
                                                                                   android.net.Uri uri,
                                                                                   java.lang.String cid,
                                                                                   boolean multiSession)
                                                                            throws PallyconDrmException
        creates DrmSessionManager which will be used in ExoPlayer for DRM process using proxy server.

        The Manager instance should be set to ExoPlayerFactory as a parameter.

        Parameters:
        drmSchemeUuid - C.WIDEVINE_UUID, unique ID of Widevine DRM
        drmLicenseUrl - address of proxy server
        uri - address of content
        cid - ID of content
        multiSession - value of key rotation
        Returns:
        PallyconDrmSessionManager
        Throws:
        PallyconDrmException - Description is in the link

      • getOfflineLicenseExpireDate

        java.lang.String getOfflineLicenseExpireDate​(java.lang.String cid)
                                      throws PallyconDrmException
        Returns Expire Date the downloaded Offline license exists in Database
        Parameters:
        cid - ID of content
        Returns:
        If successful, returns the expiration date(license duration) or null.
        Throws:
        PallyconDrmException - Description is in the link

      • setCookie

        void setCookie​(java.lang.String cookie)
        throws PallyconDrmException
        It can be used in your service by setting a cookie value.

        Example: 

           - CDN signed cookie authentication
   - Use cookies on the Proxy server
        Important: The PallyCon service does not use cookies.
        Parameters:
        cookie - cookies
        Throws:
        PallyconDrmException - Description is in the link

      • provideForceProvisionRequest

        boolean provideForceProvisionRequest()
        Try when all DRM content suddenly fails to play on the device and there is an error like the one below. 
           Failed to restore keys: General DRM error (-2000)
        This error can occur when there is a problem with provisioning and can be reset with the provideForceProvisionRequest() function.
        You must be connected to the network when using the function.

        Important: 

         - Frequent use of this function may cause other errors.
 - If there is still a problem after using this function, you may need to reinstall the app or factory reset the device.
 - Saved Offline licenses are removed when the provision is reset.
   This is because an error occurs when using a previous offline license.
        Returns:
        true if provisioning is reset, false otherwise.
